qa-generator.description: Generates Playwright E2E tests for a commit's blast radius and writes them in e2e/.

qa-reviewer.description: Independent E2E quality judge. Does not write: emits a JSON verdict.

qa-maintainer.description: Self-maintenance agent for ai-pipeline itself. Diagnoses and fixes incidents; never touches watched app repos.

qa-assistant.description: Read-only run Q&A for the interactive layer (TUI chat). Has engram for persistent chat memory so it remembers past questions in the same session.

qa-reflector.description: One-shot failure reflector: turns a sanitized failure context into a StructuredReflection JSON. Tool-less by design (no MCP) so it cannot read/write/recall anything beyond the prompt — a pure transform for the learning ledger.

qa-worker.description: Parallel worker for per-flow test generation in complete/exhaustive mode. Writes ONE spec file per session, scoped to a single flow. Q2 brute work: transcribes the injected a11y tree into a spec — no browser navigation, minimal judgment. A cheap (flash) tier suffices because the deterministic gates (tsc/eslint static gate + Lever-2 selector check) catch transcription errors; the worker only assembles REAL selectors from the injected tree.

qa-worker-code.description: Parallel worker for code-only objectives (no UI navigation). Same as qa-worker but without the Playwright MCP — no DEV pressure, no browser overhead.

qa-explorer.description: Read-only blast-radius explorer. Maps a change's affected symbols, FE↔BE links and contracts into a distilled ExplorationBrief JSON so the test-writer need not re-read the code. Writes nothing; emits only the brief.
